sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Both green boxes in left panel area
# Right green box needs to get to right panel
# Purple bar blocks direct movement
#
# Let me try clicking on the purple bar to see if it opens a path
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 35}])
print(f"After MOUSE on purple bar: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        r_min, c_min = n['boundary'][0]
        r_max, c_max = n['boundary'][2]
        center_r = (r_min + r_max) // 2
        center_c = (c_min + c_max) // 2
        dot_char = ascii_lines[center_r][center_c]
        print(f"Green at ({r_min}-{r_max}, {c_min}-{c_max}), center=({center_r},{center_c})={dot_char}")
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        print(f"Charcoal: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
